title: hieracium maculatum subsp. schistogenes
intro: Hieracium maculatum subsp. schistogenes, also known as spotted hawkweed, is a subspecies of plant within the hawkweed genus, Hieracium. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium maculatum subsp. schistogenes include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
